name: looptrip
description: looptrip — a local, deterministic, zero-LLM detector of multi-agent coordination pathologies for Claude Code.

plugins.name: looptrip
plugins.description: Trips at iteration 2 on duplicate-work, ping-pong/livelock, deadlock, and non-termination across cast.db and OpenTelemetry GenAI handoff spans. Read-only observer, never a gate; off by default.
